a:r.a:t: A unified platform for custody, trading, yield, and lending — all in one place.
Fireblocks MPC Wallet Technology — multi-party computation
Separately Managed Accounts (SMAs) — full segregation, legal title stays with client
SEC-registered RIA fiduciary standard — legal obligation to act in client's best interest
Currently BTC, ETH, SOL pairs with USDC
Backend is Talos infra + onboarded with LPs - OTC style pricing
Abra USD Yield Strategy — variable yield on stablecoins
Abra Digital Income Strategy — beta + variable yield
Abra Bitcoin Yield Strategy — monthly rate (2–3% APY range)
Levered ETH and SOL Strategies launching soon (~5% yield)
Borrow against BTC or ETH at up to 50% LTV — no credit checks
Competitive rates 4–8% APR; interest accrues to principal, no monthly payments
Open-term loans — repay when you choose, as long as LTV stays healthy
Solana loan product in testing — 3-month build
Low / no interest loan concept in development
